quickId: Slow, hovering flight near ripe fruit and drains
habitatNotes: Indicator of fermenting matter — overripe fruit, beer/soda residue, organic film in drains.
management: Remove breeding material. Drain cleaning gels for biofilm. Apple-cider-vinegar traps as monitors.

quickId: Body and wings densely hairy ('moth fly')
Weak fluttering flight near drains and sumps
habitatNotes: No bite, no disease, but presence indicates standing biofilm.
management: Mechanical drain brushing followed by enzyme/bacterial drain gels. Chemical drain cleaners alone do not work.
